response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience is primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited and outdated C++ work (e.g., C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and minor roles in other positions). He lacks recent, substantial C++ development on Windows platforms, mandatory for this role. His domain expertise in capital markets is absent, and his SQL experience is limited to MongoDB and MySQL, not SQL Server or Oracle. While his communication skills are implied by his diverse roles, the core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Strong general software development and engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, microservices)
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and domains
Open-source contributions and project leadership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Insufficient recent C++ experience (last significant role 9+ years ago)
No direct capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain experience
Lacks mandatory SQL Server/Oracle and Windows C++ development expertise
